memory_entries.text: In the product SQLite benchmark, table group g1 is the Office Products dataset: items_g1 (product metadata, avg_rtg stored rating), fdbk_g1 (reviews with rtg), taxn_g1, attrs_g1, fdbk_stats_g1. To answer stored-vs-actual average rating for office products, join items_g1 to fdbk_g1 on ref_id and compare items_g1.avg_rtg to AVG(fdbk_g1.rtg) grouped by ref_id; all g1 items are the office dataset despite mixed main_cat values.
